name: Balarama
description: Balarama (Sanskrit: बलराम, IAST: Balarāma) is a Hindu god, and the elder brother of Krishna.[7][8] He is particularly significant in the Jagannath tradition, as one of the triad deities.[9] He is also known as Haladhara, Halayudha, Baladeva, Balabhadra, and Sankarshana.

infobox.Affiliation: Avatar of Shesha in Bhagavata Vaishnavism; eighth avatar of Vishnu in some Vaishnava traditions[5]
